title: Brief Lüscher Test
subtitle: Alternative version
description: This test helps you reveal what troubles you but stays implicit—in just a few taps. Simply choose two color cards.
comment: Do not pick favorite colors. The test measures your current emotional state.

title: Full Lüscher Test
subtitle: Standard version
description: This test helps you reveal what troubles you but stays implicit—in just a few taps. Choose cards in an order that feels pleasant to you.
comment: Do not pick favorite colors. The test measures your current emotional state.
